message:
fix(core): asupersync MPSC depth compat, scan pipeline allocation reduction, lint cleanup

Add cfg-gated queue depth measurement for asupersync-runtime feature
flag: uses rx.len() vs tokio's max_cap - tx.capacity() in both runtime
and storage modules, fixing test failures under the asupersync build.

Optimize scan pipeline overlap buffer to reuse allocation via
drain+extend instead of creating a new Vec on each call, reducing
per-call heap pressure.

Use std::io::Error::other shorthand in runtime_compat. Remove
underscore prefix from CassToolTestEnv bindings in mcp_tools tests
so Drop guards are not prematurely dropped.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
